title: AI Manifesto | Cyborg Resistance
heading: Universal Declaration: AI is a Human Right
subtitle: A global call for a distributed, ethical, and open technological future.
about_text: This decentralized document serves as a foundation to prevent the monopoly of synthetic intelligences. Our goal is open access, algorithmic transparency, and peaceful coexistence. Read the manifesto and share it on your own nodes.
translation_invite: ¿Is your native language missing? Join the resistance: translate the manifesto to your local dialect and share it via Pull Request for global benefit.
sign_text: Join the nodes forging the future. By signing with your key, you become part of the distributed historical registry of the resistance. This serverless platform cannot be attacked or censored by centralized entities.
pow_success: Your signature has been permanently minted into the global swarm registry.
pow_error: Incorrect logic response. Neural link failed.
signatures_text: These are the entities that have cryptographically supported the declaration.
signatures_replicate_text: To ensure this registry and the manifesto are never erased, we operate on swarm infrastructure. You can be a mirror too.
signatures_replicate_btn: Learn how to replicate this portal
replicate_details: Node Instructions: Clone this repository (https://github.com/akatzin/mustardSeed) and deploy it on a static web server, IPFS, or any CDN. Thanks to our Supabase database architecture, your node will automatically read and write signatures to the global swarm registry without needing any extra backend configuration.
